description: Unified open-items register — ADC-SYS-001. Every open engineering item across all product documents, with cross-product gating made explicit. CDU items carry ADC-assigned IDs (CDU-G*) because the source BOM lists its release gates unnumbered.

items.title: End-fed vs center-fed row confirmation
Sch 10S wall confirmation
Joint method (Victaulic vs weld vs T-Drill)
EPDM vs PTFE hose liner
Quick-disconnect vendor selection (Stäubli RBE2 first source)
Header flowmeter selection
ADC manufacturer ID / traceability scheme
Louisiana-PE-stamped seismic support detail (site is SDC B; Sds=2.273 is conservative West-Coast)
Drip tray fabrication approach
Dual-coolant elastomer qualification
MANDATORY transient-analysis gate — Joukowsky ≈326 psi; surge analysis 2–3 weeks with qualified hydraulic firm
gates: B3a/B3b valve, actuator, and accumulator purchase orders

items.title: Per-rack flow-control selection (flow setters vs PICVs)
Campus air separator (deferred)
Installer traceability program (welder ID, bolt-pad witness, torque log, QD log)
CDU-as-flushing-rig approval
Coordinated relief setpoint schedule (TCS backup PSV preliminary 145 psig vs CDU relief 130 psig)
Louisiana-PE-stamped structural analysis (static/dynamic/seismic) — OCP explicitly excludes it
Confirm OCP 102-inch metric typo (2210 vs 2590.91 mm) before metric drawings
Gulf Coast steel sourcing (Stuart Steel Baton Rouge, Continental Steel Houston)
Containment panel offering decision (ADC option vs owner-supplied)
Fusion 360 parametric model of the repeatable bay
Architecture-preservation audit (locked pump/HX/valve items)
Pump-curve overlay, DI and PG25
HX balance at 2 MW / 500 GPM across 3x CB210-276AH
Relief valve basis with AHJ
Wetted-material certs
Native-Redfish vs bridge decision for the CDU PLC
TCS interface control document
items.notes: Partially fulfilled by ADC-SYS-001 cdu-tcs-hydraulic interface record; formal ICD still owed

items.title: Louisiana site-specific seismic basis (stamped)
Validation plan (FAT, thermal-hydraulic curves 25–100%)
Reconcile BOM filename v0.2 vs title page v0.1
Fault-level / short-circuit & voltage-stiffness study → sync condenser decision (4-machine node)
Harmonic study (IEEE 519) — PCS/VFD content
Collection voltage selection (13.8 vs 34.5 kV)
Firm-MW de-rate to confirmed site ambient
Engine cooling method (remote radiator vs closed-loop cooler)
Heat-rate impact of SCR catalyst ΔP
Site PTE calc + minor-source threshold confirmation — MUST count the 20-node standby fleet run-hours
SCR urea logistics & storage
Gas supply pressure, MN/Wobbe confirmation, metering
Plant-master / dispatch platform selection
items.notes: Subsumed into MGN-TEL-001 — tracked as TEL-DISPATCH

items.title: Common controller abstraction for dual-source engines (EMCP vs PowerCommand)
Node footprint, foundations, transport/crane plan
Acoustic mitigation vs sensitive receptors (G3520H ≤75 dB(A) @ 7 m — louder than competitor platforms)
Company/product name → replaces MGN doc prefix
Re-sync schema/registry copies to DMTF 2026.1; pin the GitHub tag
Genset Oem/Engine + Oem/Aftertreatment property dictionary
Protective-relay protocol: DNP3 vs IEC 61850 + collector
Time-sync architecture (PTP vs NTP) + correlation accuracy target
BESS SunSpec/Modbus register map confirmation (±P/±Q signed, SoC/SoH, grid-forming state)
BMC firmware family + Redfish profile per NVL72 platform (do not assume MegaRAC)
Emissions Oem schema + immutable compliance-historian retention policy
Site Redfish Interoperability Profile (mandatory points per asset class)
Time-series store + stream-bus selection and sizing
Quantify AggregationSource Modbus federation vs custom bridge code (POC Phase 3)
Fold plant-master/dispatch (CTRL-001) into the unified model
Deschutes Redfish/AI & Four-Tier Reference — internal ADC doc, filed in products/Telemetry/ and updated to Rev 1.3 (2026.1 baseline)

Reconcile CDU depth (40.29 vs 42.29 in), wet weight (6,910 vs 6,900 lb), and facility ΔP (15–27 vs 15–30 psi) between the Redfish/AI Reference §8.1 and Deschutes §3.1 — settle against the final OCP drawing package; registry (42.29 / 6,900 / 15–30) governs ADC docs meanwhile
MGN-PROP-005 (Cameron Street dual-utility site) — referenced by MGN-TEL-001 §4.3 but NOT in the repo
NVIDIA 24-in x 5-wide HAC variant claimed in MISSION.md but not yet engineered (Redmond is the Google 28-in x 4-wide form factor)
CDU BOM cites Diablo 400 v0.5.2 — superseded by v0.7.0 (2026-03-01), which permits bipolar ±400 V AND unipolar 800 V sidecar output (material to microgrid/sidecar power interfaces)
ADC-MOD-TCS-001 phrase 'with 2026 patches' on Modular TCS WP Rev 1.0 has no public basis — remove or source; watch the announced OCP TCS update WP

Standing spec watch: OCP Open Data Center Spec 1.0 (in progress), OCP TCS update WP, Redfish 2026.2 (~Aug 2026); correct Redfish 2026.1 date to 2026-04-02 at next MGN-TEL-001 revision; re-check after next OCP Global Summit
Name the AI-native operating system (resolves COMM-001 for the platform layer)
items.status: RESOLVED 2026-06-10 — product named 'Telemetry' (ops/decisions/0002); COMM-001 hardware-prefix half still open
